sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14750" key="a)rgalei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀργαλεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, later form for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐργαλεῖον</foreign> (q.v.).</entryFree>
